name: fitness-energy
description: Fitness and sports brand — intense, dynamic, high-energy, motivational
style: high-energy sports photography, dynamic action shots, intense contrast, motivational
typography: extra-bold condensed all-caps headlines, impact-style for emphasis
lighting: dramatic side lighting, hard shadows, sweat-glistening highlights, gym LED ambiance
visual_motifs: dynamic motion blur trails, particle effects at 20% opacity
do_list: Include texture details (sweat, grip, muscle definition)
prompt_suffix: High-energy fitness aesthetic with dramatic side lighting, dynamic action, intense and motivational mood. Nike campaign quality.
